data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Emitting CLAUDE.md suggested-change report (read-only guard applies). Two changes needed: (1) agent table row for approach-decision-maker lacks dispatch context; (2) architecture section missing proposal generation and resolution loop documentation. Step numbering in SKILL.md unchanged — subsections added within existing flow, no impl-plan-dispatch.md references to update.
